name: Crystal Lake Yacht Club
description: Crystal Lake Yacht Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Frankfort, MI. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms and water.
fees: Private — There is a fee charged to members for their guests.

name: Crystal Mountain Resort
description: Come play pickleball at Crystal Mountain Resort in Thompsonville, MI! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Market Square Park
description: Market Square Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Frankfort, MI. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to water, restrooms, and lights. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: Open play M,W,F- All levels Open play T,Th,Sat- Intermediate/Advanced
